description.p: You can add your proficiency bonus to any ability check or saving throw the shikigami makes. Your shikigami uses your proficiency bonus for attacks and saves. At 5th level your shikigami has advantage on melee attack rolls against a creature if you are within 5 feet of the creature and are not incapacitated.

sheet.description: You can add your proficiency bonus to any ability check or saving throw the shikigami makes. Your shikigami uses your proficiency bonus for attacks and saves.

You can add your proficiency bonus to any ability check or saving throw the shikigami makes. Your shikigami uses your proficiency bonus for attacks and saves. Your shikigami has advantage on melee attack rolls against a creature if you are within 5 feet of the creature and are not incapacitated.

description.p: At 15th level, when your shikigami companion hits with an attack, you can spend cursed energy up to your CE modifier as a reaction to use Cursed Strike through your companion.

sheet.description: When your shikigami companion hits with an attack, you can spend cursed energy up to your CE modifier as a reaction to use Cursed Strike through your companion.

description.p: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) + your proficiency bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) + {{companion:proficiency}} bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage.
